title: aeschynanthus fruticosus
intro: Aeschynanthus fruticosus, also known as the "Mistmaistress" or "Moss Bleeding Heart", is a flowering plant species in the Gesneriaceae family. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia, particularly in the Philippines and Malaysia. Aeschynanthus fruticosus has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, which are believed to provide health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, but more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
